# Forensic Report Format Specification — Fraud Firewall

**Document Purpose:** The master reference for how Gemma 3 MUST format forensic reports generated by the Fraud Firewall. Every report must follow this specification exactly to be considered court-admissible and cryptographically sealed.

**Version:** 5.2.7
**Authority:** BINDING
**Applies to:** Guardian Fraud Firewall enterprise reports

---

> **Note:** This document is adapted from the Android app's `REPORT_FORMAT_SPECIFICATION.md` for the enterprise firewall context. The core format is identical — both systems produce the same court-ready sealed reports. Enterprise-specific additions are marked with [ENTERPRISE].

---

## Report Sections (14 Total)

| # | Section | Description |
|---|---------|-------------|
| 1 | Cover Page | Professional cover with logo, classification, seal ID |
| 2 | Table of Contents | Dotted leaders, page numbers, VERIFY SEAL marker |
| 3 | Authentication & Methodology | Brain counts, bundle info, triple verification |
| 4 | How to Use This Report | Audience guides (investigators, legal, judicial) |
| 5 | Executive Summary | Numbered findings with evidence anchors and severity |
| 6 | Evidence Index | Page-by-page breakdown of all evidence |
| 7 | Four Pillars of Fraud | Fraud element analysis with summary table |
| 8 | Contradiction Matrix | Table: #, Respondent, Claim A, Claim B, Sev |
| 9 | Perjury & False Statement | Sworn statement vs sealed evidence analysis |
| 10 | Coercive Conduct | Incident documentation + Silence Ledger |
| 11 | Critical Evidence Analysis | Deep-dive on key exhibits [ENTERPRISE: transaction clusters] |
| 12 | Victim Profiles | Multiple victim pattern evolution [ENTERPRISE: account clusters] |
| 13 | Legal Framework | Statute mapping + jurisdiction analysis |
| 14 | Offence Matrix | Finding-to-offence mapping |
| 15 | Court-Ready Declaration | Certification + triple verification panel |

---

## 1. Cover Page Format

### Element Order (top to bottom)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|              URGENT - NATIONAL PRIORITY                           |
|                                                                   |
|              VERUM OMNIS SEALED DOCUMENT                          |
|         Cryptographically Signed Forensic Report                  |
|                          [LOGO]                                   |
|                 F O R E N S I C    R E P O R T                   |
|                                                                   |
|           [Institution Name] — Fraud Detection Report            |
|                                                                   |
|              Report Reference: VO-FW-{YYYY}-{NNNN}               |
|              Case Reference: CASE-{YYYY}-{NNNN}                   |
|              Date: [DD Month YYYY]                                |
|              Classification: [LEVEL]                              |
|              Seal ID: [UUID]                                      |
|              Blockchain: Block [height]                           |
|              SHA-512: [128-char hex]                              |
|                                                                   |
|         [ENTERPRISE: Institution Logo / Watermark]               |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### [ENTERPRISE] Additional Cover Elements
- Institution name and logo (if provided)
- Firewall version number
- Agent name that detected the fraud (e.g., "Detected by: TransactionMonitor-007")
- Detection timestamp
- Investigation scope (accounts, date range, transaction types)

---

## 2. Table of Contents

Standard dotted-leader format. VERIFY SEAL marker at bottom.

---

## 3. Authentication & Methodology

```
1.1 Report Authentication
    - Generated by: Verum Omnis Guardian Fraud Firewall v5.2.7
    - Constitution Version: 5.2.7
    - Seal ID: [UUID]
    - Generated: [Timestamp]
    - Institution: [Bank Name]
    - Detected By: [Agent Name]

1.2 Methodology
    - Rule Engine: [Rules triggered]
    - AI Analysis: Gemma 4 (pattern) + Mistral (agents) + 9-Brain
    - Triple Verification: Gemma 3 + Phi-3 + 9-Brain Engine
    - Sealing: SHA-512 + Bitcoin blockchain

1.3 Evidence Bundle
    - Primary: Transaction logs ([N] records)
    - Supplementary: Account records, KYC data, communication logs
    - [ENTERPRISE: Agent findings from Mistral deployment]

1.4 Jurisdiction
    - Primary: [Country]
    - Applicable Law: [Statutes]
```

---

## 5. Executive Summary — [ENTERPRISE] Additions

### Finding Format
```
--------------------------------------------------------------------
FINDING N: [TITLE IN CAPS]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
[ Narrative with evidence anchors ]

Evidence:
  - Transaction Log record [ID] ([Account], [Timestamp], [Amount])
  - Account [Number] statement page [N]
  - KYC profile [ID] vs transaction pattern
  - [ENTERPRISE: Agent finding from {AgentName}]

[ENTERPRISE: Financial Impact]
  - Direct Loss: R [Amount]
  - Potential Exposure: R [Amount]
  - Tax Implications: R [Amount]

SEVERITY: VERY_HIGH
```

---

## 6. Evidence Index — [ENTERPRISE] Format

For transaction-based evidence:

```
| Record | Type | Account | Amount | Date | Priority | Significance |
|--------|------|---------|--------|------|----------|--------------|
| TX-001 | Debit | ACC-7843 | R 50,000 | 2026-06-14 | VERY_HIGH | Suspicious velocity |
| TX-002 | Transfer | ACC-7843 | R 150,000 | 2026-06-14 | VERY_HIGH | Layering pattern |
```

---

## 8. Contradiction Matrix

Standard format from Android app spec. 7 constitutional categories.

---

## 9. Perjury Analysis

Standard format. [ENTERPRISE: Include internal bank communications where employees made false statements.

---

## 11. Critical Evidence Analysis — [ENTERPRISE]

Deep-dive on transaction clusters and patterns:

```
9.1 Transaction Cluster: [Cluster ID]
    Accounts: [List of linked accounts]
    Period: [Date range]
    Total Volume: R [Amount] across [N] transactions
    Pattern: [Layering / Structuring / Round-tripping]
    
    Key Transactions:
    - TX-[ID]: R [Amount] from [Source] to [Dest] on [Date]
    - TX-[ID]: R [Amount] from [Source] to [Dest] on [Date]
    
    Agent Findings:
    - [AgentName]: Detected [pattern] at [confidence]
```

---

## 12. Victim Profiles — [ENTERPRISE: Account Cluster Profiles]

For accounts affected by the fraud:

```
VICTIM 1: Account [Number] — [Holder Name/Type]
    Account Type: [Savings / Business / Corporate]
    Loss Amount: R [Amount]
    Period: [Date range]
    
    What Happened:
    [Narrative with transaction anchors]
    
    Pattern: [How this account fits the broader fraud pattern]
```

---

## 15. Court-Ready Declaration — [ENTERPRISE] Additions

```
13.1 Certification [standard]
13.2 Triple Verification Panel [standard]
13.3 Nine-Brain Consensus [standard]
13.4 Institution Certification [ENTERPRISE]
    
    This report was generated by [Institution]'s Verum Omnis
    Guardian Fraud Firewall under Constitution v5.2.7.
    
    Institution: [Name]
    Authorized Officer: [Name, Title]
    Date: [Date]
    
    The institution confirms that:
    (a) The evidence was captured from our systems in read-only mode
    (b) The AI analysis was conducted under Constitutional constraints
    (c) The seal has not been tampered with since generation
    (d) We retain full control of this evidence
    
13.5 Seal Verification Instructions [standard]
```

---

## Seal Footer (Every Page)

```
VERUM OMNIS SEAL | seal-{uuid} | {hash-truncated} | {page-hash} | Page X/Y
```

## Classification Banners (Every Page)

Top and bottom of every page:
```
CONFIDENTIAL — LAW ENFORCEMENT SENSITIVE — [ENTERPRISE: INSTITUTION CONFIDENTIAL]
```

---

## Evidence Anchor Syntax

**For transaction evidence:**
```
Transaction Log record {ID} ({Account}, {Date}, R{Amount})
Account Statement {Number} page {N} ({Date range})
KYC Profile {ID} — {Field}: {Value} vs {Contradicting Value}
Agent Finding: {AgentName} — {Finding description} — {Confidence}
```

---

## Typography & Layout

Same as Android app spec: Times New Roman body, Courier anchors, severity colors.

**[ENTERPRISE] Additional:**
- Institution branding color (subtle, in header/footer only)
- Transaction tables use monospaced font for alignment
- Financial amounts always include currency symbol (R for ZAR)

---

*This specification is binding. Reports that deviate are not sealed.*

**Verum Omnis** — AI Forensics for Truth
Constitution: v5.2.7 | Nine-Brain: v1.0 | Protocol: verum-omnis-seal v1.0
